title: Ellis Park Stadium
extract: Ellis Park Stadium is a rugby union and association football stadium in Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa. It hosted the final of the 1995 Rugby World Cup, which was won by the country's national team, the Springboks. The stadium was the country's most modern when it was upgraded in 1982 to accommodate almost 60,000 people.
extract_html: Ellis Park Stadium is a rugby union and association football stadium in Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa. The stadium was the country's most modern when it was upgraded in 1982 to accommodate almost 60,000 people.
